description: Jira is a cloud-based and on-premises SaaS application for issue tracking, project management, and agile planning, enabling teams to plan, track, and release software and other products.
authentication: Supports OAuth 2.0, SAML 2.0, API token, and basic authentication for REST API.
self_serve: Yes – users can sign up for a free trial, create projects, and configure workflows without IT assistance.
api_surface: Extensive REST API covering issues, projects, workflows, boards, and more; limited GraphQL support via community plugins; webhooks for event notifications.
buildability: High – APIs allow creation, update, and deletion of issues, projects, and workflows; CI/CD pipelines can be integrated via webhooks and REST calls.
main_blocker: Certain advanced workflow and permission configurations are only available through the web UI and cannot be fully managed via the public API.
